IsA: It is a cooperative tabletop crime-solving hidden object game.
HasA: It has a poster-sized map.
It has illustrated characters.
It has criminal activities.
It has a victim.
It has a crime scene.
It has a deck of 5–12 cards with clues.
It has 16 cases.
It has a difficulty rating ranging from one to five stars.
It has unique icons representing each case.
It has details such as clothing, decoration, and directionality.
HasFeatureOf: It is characterized by cooperative gameplay.
It is characterized by crime-solving.
It is characterized by hidden object elements.
It is characterized by an illustrated urban area.
It is characterized by characters performing ordinary daily tasks.
It is characterized by characters engaging in criminal activities.
It is characterized by tracking the victim and potential perpetrator backward and forward in time.
It is characterized by requiring a deductive leap at times.
It is characterized by sequels that follow the same basic format.
It is characterized by positive reviews.
UsedFor: It is used for solving crimes.
It is used for tracking victims.
It is used for tracking potential perpetrators.
It is used for experiencing what the game offers before buying.
LocatedIn: It is located in an urban area depicted on a map.
DevelopedBy: It was developed by Johannes Sich.
PublishedIn: It was published by Edition Spielwiese.
ProducedBy: It was produced by Edition Spielwiese.
ConsistsOf: It consists of a poster-sized map.
It consists of illustrated characters.
It consists of criminal activities.
It consists of a victim.
It consists of a crime scene.
It consists of a deck of 5–12 cards with clues.
It consists of 16 cases.
It consists of a difficulty rating ranging from one to five stars.
It consists of unique icons representing each case.
It consists of details such as clothing, decoration, and directionality.
KnownFor: It is known for its cooperative tabletop crime-solving gameplay.
It is known for its poster-sized map.
It is known for its hidden object elements.
It is known for its positive reviews.
It is known for winning the Spiel des Jahres in 2021.
It is known for its sequels.
It is known for blending features from puzzle books and mystery-solving board games.
It is known for its box cover art implementing a sample mini-mystery.
AssociatedWith: It is associated with Johannes Sich.
It is associated with Edition Spielwiese.
It is associated with the Spiel des Jahres award.
It is associated with L'As d'Or Jeu de l'Année.
It is associated with Board Game Geek.
It is associated with the COVID-19 pandemic.
It is associated with Where's Wally?.
It is associated with Sherlock Holmes: Consulting Detective.
WonBy: It was won by the Spiel des Jahres award in 2021.
It was won by the L'As d'Or Jeu de l'Année.
It was won by the 2020 Light Game of the Year award.
It was won by the Innovative Game award from Board Game Geek.
About: It is about solving crimes.
It is about tracking victims.
It is about tracking perpetrators.
It is about a depicted urban area.
It is about characters performing daily tasks.
It is about characters engaging in criminal activities.
It is about petty theft.
It is about murder.
It is about clues.
It is about cases.
InfluencedBy: It was influenced by puzzle books such as Where's Wally?.
It was influenced by mystery-solving board games such as Sherlock Holmes: Consulting Detective.
